{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318360106CCC286A0DD018601E6"}"},"total":13774},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7076699314911068968","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本很不错的小说，里面的市井气息活灵活现，看多了什么现代都市，系统之类的文章，换换口味也不错，看了一会便沉浸在古代生活的慢节奏中，也令自己常常幻想假设我处在这种情形之下，这剧情又将如何走向....毕竟看小说最令人愉悦的就是可以靠着自己的想象力去填补这个虚构世界的方方面面，里面所描绘的人物都有血有肉，只不过缺少一些情节上的波动...可能是因为这本书之前被下架过的原因，字里行间能感受到作者的小心翼翼，希望作者大大能坚持写下去，另外要是在剧情上有曲折坎坷的地方就好了....加油！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1647672466,"group_id":"7055535092411665442","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在现实中死亡，在虚拟中重生..","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2lYugrecv26Ag5vm4qofb4XrOKEzDOAHeEvEDfpghVG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1601361350763247","user_name":"用户16013613"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1601361350763247","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7055535092411665442","book_info":{"abstract":"赵策一朝穿越到大明，穿越成了个声名狼藉的穷酸书生。
而且他还发现，自己借钱娶妻，却把钱挥霍完了，最后在半路买了个可怜巴巴的小瘸子回来充数。
这小瘸子，还是个有着异瞳，被当成怪物一般的存在。
赵策：这是什么人间疾苦，天崩开局？
然而再一看这小瘸子，瘦瘦小小的一个，大眼睛眨巴眨巴的......有点可爱。
看着这一贫如洗的家，农家子的赵策只得撸起袖子，一边读书，一边带着自己的小妻子开始发家致富。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0184c213efd368f0635035966d4478a9","author":"菜比比","author_id":"","book_id":"7055535092411665442","book_name":"寒门书生，开局捡个便宜小娇妻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8b0a0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7055540785349034496","read_count":"52639","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2278479"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1062","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,发家致富,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1c28a2df1c787889187c5add721efe9c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446161&x-signature=eGfkZMQNJW5rCJUigrt2gaY%2FPKo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1179132352539902","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.6763871e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318360106CCC286A0DD018601E6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":39,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16763,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":1085
